suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Refine the frontend-experience-worker procedure and handoff rubric so `skillFeedback.followedProcedure=true` requires concrete transcript evidence of the mandated pre-change `.factory/library/*.md`, `design-system.md`, and hero/immersive screenshot review, or an explicit exception path when those reads are not relevant.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Round 1 already flagged missing screenshot-review evidence for `visual-source-overhaul-radiant-asset-background`, and the rerun review for `visual-source-overhaul-static-fallback-and-canvas-resilience-fix` again found `followedProcedure=true` without transcript evidence of the required library/design-system/screenshot reads before editing the immersive hero system.
